issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Instrument a multi-step RAG agent with semantic trace hierarchy
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Traceloop.init plus @workflow/@task/@agent/@tool decorators to build a meaningful span hierarchy; baseline writes raw OpenTelemetry spans without OpenLLMetry's auto-instrumentation or AI semantic conventions.

scenarios.name: Export LLM traces from existing app to self-hosted Grafana Tempo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Traceloop.init with api_endpoint pointing at the Tempo OTLP HTTP endpoint and the documented headers parameter; baseline configures generic OTel exporters and misses the one-line auto-instrumentation pattern.
